Headline: Machine Learning Engineer @FHNW
Summary: Ms in Machine Learning student at KTH Royal Institute of Technology, Stockholm (Sweden).  I will soon start my degree project in Image Segmentation for Medical Images, with the intent to measure the diameter of the optic nerve and trying to correlate it to clinical outcomes. I will make use of the nnU-Net network and a dataset provided directly from Karolinska Institutet. Willing to gain experience in the field of Computer Vision, especially apply to the medical field.  My experience with Python mainly revolves around projects held here at KTH, and the main topics I feel comfortable with are: - Deep Learning (eg. tensorflow, keras) and Machine Learning (eg. scikit-learn, numpy) frameworks  - Graphs embeddings (Graph2Vec, graphons) - CNN for image classification  - Data Science  Graduated in Engineering and Management at the University of Padua in July 2021.
